chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-168 of 2024 (Zakir Hussain and another Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 708/2024 (U/A) 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on CMA No. 709/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case. 29-02-2024. None present for the petitioners. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. The petitioners by way of instant petition have sought for direction against the respondents to appoint them as Chowkidar or Peon with them as they have donated plot for establishment of Dispensary and Govt. Primary School in village Karimdad Lashari. The appointment in Civil Service is to be made on merits by following the procedure prescribed under Sindh Civil Servant, Act, 1973 and Rules framed therein and not on the basis of donation of plot; therefore directions sought for by the petitioners against the respondents for their appointment as Chowkidar or Peon could not be issued by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently the instant petition being misconceived in dismissed in limine. Judge 2 Judge Nasim/P.A
